title: Ungarr Daris
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Ungarr Daris |homeworld=[[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Ungarr Daris, you're a very important man. I'll give you a choice. You can come with me and continue to be an important man, or you can die right here and now."
"I don’t want any trouble, just don't hurt my family."
"As long as you or your family don't upset me, they'll be fine."|Tyber Zann and Ungarr Daris|''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''}} '''Ungarr Daris''' was a powerful [[Human/Legends|Human]] politician from [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. ==Biography== Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Daris was kidnapped by [[Tyber Zann]] for the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]. He cooperated after his security forces failed and on the understanding that he and his family would not be harmed. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |uk=Унґарр Даріс }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Davis, Ungarr}} [[Category:Government figures]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Thyferrans]]
